violations: Gate 3 — Required tests are absent and do not exercise the integration point (Rule 1). spec.md 'Required tests' mandates a unit test that mocks planner dispatch and verifies spec.md is written with ACs, plus the 'no ACs' error path. The delivered tests (cmd/sworn/task_test.go) only exercise the leaf helpers hasAcceptanceChecks and extractSpecFromReply; no test invokes cmdRunTask (the function owning the `sworn run --task` outcome), mocks the planner Verify() call, or asserts that spec.md is written. AC2/AC3(integration)/AC4/AC5 are covered by no automated test.

Gate 5 — Placeholder test with no assertions. cmd/sworn/task_test.go:129-134 TestTaskDryRunFlagAccepted has an empty body (only a comment) and passes vacuously; it is not surfaced as a Rule 2 deferral in proof.md 'Not delivered'.

Gate 2 — Undeclared, unexplained touchpoint. internal/git/git.go is changed (new Config() method used by task.go:167-168, plus the unrelated Branch() function reformatted onto a single line) but is not in spec.md 'Planned touchpoints' and proof.md 'Divergence from plan' states 'None' — it never mentions internal/git/git.go.

Quality (AGENTS.md 'Keep go vet clean and code gofmt'd') — all four changed files fail gofmt -l: cmd/sworn/task.go (line 142 collapses two struct fields onto one line), cmd/sworn/run.go (over-indented lines 37/43/145, brace+comment on line 174), cmd/sworn/task_test.go, and internal/git/git.go (Branch() collapsed onto one line — churn damage to a file shared with other tracks).
